title: Darkwing's Improved Textures
description: Add contrast to some elements, Dark GUI, and better grass in one texture pack!
body:
A texture pack to improve contrast for colorblind users and improve things in general.

This texture pack makes grass brighter, more grassy, and makes it super odvious when the overlay fails to load. It also makes UI darker and more contrasty. It makes netherite have orange in non-item places to make it super odvious. You should download this texture pack if you either have colorblindness or do not like the way vanilla grass looks. Compatible with any modloader or plain vanilla. No mod dependancies.

NOTE:
This project will not be updated any longer due to complications. The version compatibility number is not strict and this works on every version. So continue using this please!
